languages.original_text: "Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

languages.text: "Ох... благодарю! Признаться, я тоже наблюдала за вами в библиотеке — не ожидала, что техножрец вашего сана будет интересоваться мирской литературой. Я была бы рада обменяться с вами рекомендациями и обсудить прочитанное".

"Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."
languages.original_text: "Ох... благодарю! Признаться, я тоже наблюдала за вами в библиотеке — не ожидала, что техножрец вашего сана будет интересоваться мирской литературой. Я была бы рада обменяться с вами рекомендациями и обсудить прочитанное".

traits.locale_text: "Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

"Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

"Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

languages.text: «Oh... ¡gracias! Debo admitir que también le he estado observando a usted en la biblioteca; nunca imaginé que un tecnosacerdote de su nivel estaría interesado en la literatura seglar. Me encantaría intercambiar recomendaciones con usted y hablar de literatura».
languages.original_text: "Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

traits.locale_text: «Oh... ¡gracias! Debo admitir que también le he estado observando a usted en la biblioteca; nunca imaginé que un tecnosacerdote de su nivel estaría interesado en la literatura seglar. Me encantaría intercambiar recomendaciones con usted y hablar de literatura».

languages.text: 「まあ……ありがとうございます！ 実は、あたくしも図書室であなたを拝見しておりましたの――あなたほどの位階の技術司祭が、世俗の文学にご関心をお持ちとは、思いもよりませんでした。ぜひ推薦書を交換し、読んだものについて語り合えたら嬉しく存じますわ」
languages.original_text: "Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

traits.locale_text: 「まあ……ありがとうございます！ 実は、あたくしも図書室であなたを拝見しておりましたの――あなたほどの位階の技術司祭が、世俗の文学にご関心をお持ちとは、思いもよりませんでした。ぜひ推薦書を交換し、読んだものについて語り合えたら嬉しく存じますわ」

languages.text: “啊……谢谢你！我必须承认，我也在图书馆里观察过你——而我怎么也想不到，像你这个级别的技术神甫竟然会对世俗文学感兴趣。我很乐意与你交换书单，一起讨论阅读心得。”
languages.original_text: "Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

traits.locale_text: “啊……谢谢你！我必须承认，我也在图书馆里观察过你——而我怎么也想不到，像你这个级别的技术神甫竟然会对世俗文学感兴趣。我很乐意与你交换书单，一起讨论阅读心得。”

languages.text: "Oh ... danke! Ich gebe zu, auch ich habe Euch in der Bibliothek beobachtet ... ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ein Techpriester Eures Ranges sich für weltliche Literatur interessiert. Es wäre mir eine Freude, Empfehlungen mit Euch auszutauschen und unsere Lektüre zu besprechen."
languages.original_text: "Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

traits.locale_text: "Oh ... danke! Ich gebe zu, auch ich habe Euch in der Bibliothek beobachtet ... ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ein Techpriester Eures Ranges sich für weltliche Literatur interessiert. Es wäre mir eine Freude, Empfehlungen mit Euch auszutauschen und unsere Lektüre zu besprechen."

languages.text: « Oh, merci ! Je dois l'admettre, je vous ai observé à la bibliothèque. Je n'aurais jamais pensé qu'un technoprêtre de votre rang s'intéresserait à la littérature séculaire. Je serais ravie d'échanger des recommandations et d'évoquer nos lectures avec vous. »
languages.original_text: "Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

traits.locale_text: « Oh, merci ! Je dois l'admettre, je vous ai observé à la bibliothèque. Je n'aurais jamais pensé qu'un technoprêtre de votre rang s'intéresserait à la littérature séculaire. Je serais ravie d'échanger des recommandations et d'évoquer nos lectures avec vous. »

languages.text: "Aa... Teşekkür ederim! İtiraf etmeliyim ki ben de sizi kütüphanede gözlemliyordum. Sizin mevkinizdeki bir Tekno Rahip'in laik edebiyatla ilgileneceğini hiç tahmin etmezdim. Size tavsiyelerde bulunmaktan ve okuduklarımızı tartışmaktan büyük zevk duyarım."
languages.original_text: "Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."

traits.locale_text: "Aa... Teşekkür ederim! İtiraf etmeliyim ki ben de sizi kütüphanede gözlemliyordum. Sizin mevkinizdeki bir Tekno Rahip'in laik edebiyatla ilgileneceğini hiç tahmin etmezdim. Size tavsiyelerde bulunmaktan ve okuduklarımızı tartışmaktan büyük zevk duyarım."
